title: Prince and the New Power Generation: Diamonds and Pearls Live at Glam Slam
original_title: Prince & The New Power Generation: Live at Glam Slam
overview: Organized and recorded on very short notice, Live At Glam Slam provides fans with the opportunity to experience Prince and the NPG at the peak of their powers. Arranged to preview the Diamonds And Pearls Tour, this intimate January 11th performance finds Prince & The New Power Generation tearing through songs from the recently released Diamonds And Pearls album at breakneck pace.
